privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic complaint case in ArkCase titled 'Delayed Public Records Response - EPA Region 5' with initial priority 'Low'. The agent must search for this case by title and update its priority to 'High'. ArkCase is a real open-source case management system that uses REST API endpoints for complaint management. The case is created via POST to /api/v1/plugin/complaint with caseType 'GENERAL' and stored with a dynamically generated ID. All metadata claims regarding case title, initial priority, and target priority are accurate and verifiable from the source code.
